meta.title: What is HAMAS... and do they speak for Palestine?
meta.description:
Israel has declared war on the Islamist extremist group known as Hamas after a surprise attack that began on Saturday claimed the lives of more than 1,200 Israelis. 

But what is Hamas, and what is their relationship to the Palestinian people? This is a complex topic with a complex answer that Alex Hollings tries to untangle in this special report.
